name: Tofu with Crab Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the hard edges off the tofu, then cut it into 1"x1"x1/3 inch pieces.
2. Boil in boiling water for 1 minute, drain and dry.
3. Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a pan and fry the ginger and crab meat for a few seconds.
4. Sprinkle in 1 teaspoon wine and pour in the soup stock immediately.
5. Add the tofu gently and season with 2 tablespoons salt.
6. Cook over low heat for 3 minutes until thickened.
7. Mix cornstarch and 3 teaspoons water, stir into tofu until thickened.
8. Stir in beaten egg white and chopped crab roe.
9. Stir until blended, then turn out on a platter.
10. Sprinkle with chopped scallion and splash the melted chicken grease on top.
11. Serve with rice.
